name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It's simple: We have to win Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
When Trump announced his focus on winning Minnesota, we knew we had to keep our guard up. Now, far-right favorite Jason Lewis just announced he is challenging Tina Smith for her Senate seat.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190904Warren-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, there's a whole lot on the line in Minnesota.

When Donald Trump set his eyes on winning Minnesota, we knew we had to keep our guard up.**Now, far-right favorite Jason Lewis just announced he is challenging Tina Smith for her Senate seat.**

Jason Lewis is extreme, and if he's elected, he could give Mitch McConnell and the fringe far-right everything they ever wanted.

**I 'll just be blunt: The road to taking back the Senate gets way too rocky if we don't defend Tina Smith.**

I'm fighting to make sure that Democrats win across the country in 2020 -- and keeping Tina in the Senate is one of my top priorities.

**[We have to fight for Tina. Please rush $10 or anything you can so we can defend Minnesota's Senate seat.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190904Warren-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc416e0/c1f7015/67ed672e/11465579/261103554/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkwNFdhcnJlbi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190904Warren-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

We've had enough of Mitch McConnell putting small-minded partisanship head of solving the massive problems facing this country. >From securing our elections to defending health care, there's too much at stake to let Republicans keep blocking the change we need.

**So if we're going to stop the stonewalling in the Senate and make Washington work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful, we have to stop Jason Lewis. And Tina needs as much grassroots support as possible to take on this threat.**

**[If you're in this fight all the way to retake the Senate for Democrats, please rush $10 or anything you can now to Tina.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190904Warren-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190904Warren-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Our impact is showing up in big ways
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Tonight is a big night for climate.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6090?t=3&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah) Friend, Candidates are stepping up to the plate -- and I'm proud to see it. I hope you are, too. I've been speaking with many of the candidates since I stepped away from the presidential race. Now, I'm proud to see folks like Elizabeth Warren, Kamala Harris, and Julian Castro take such bold strides in their climate plans to address this undeniable climate crisis. I'm especially excited to see Senator Warren embrace our aggressive targets to reach 100% clean energy in electricity, cars, and buildings -- in addition to ending coal power and making a commitment to investing in good union jobs and a just transition for front-line communities. I meant it when I said I'd continue fighting to keep climate on the main stage. This is proof of that -- I'm looking forward to tonight's CNN Climate Town Hall to hear even more from the candidates about their plans to continue our climate movement. **I need your help to keep it going. Tonight's a big night, but we need climate in every debate, every town hall, every moment we can in this election:** [**Will you donate $5 or more to support keeping climate at the top of the conversation in 2020?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6090?t=4&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6091?t=5&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6092?t=6&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6093?t=7&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6094?t=8&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6095?t=9&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6096?t=10&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---
Together, you and I built a movement to put climate change front and center. And you know what? That's exactly what we did. But our work is far from over. It's our job to keep every candidate, and our Democratic Party, accountable for the long haul. Climate action must stay a central focus of what we do -- beyond one night.
I'm proud of the impact of our campaign -- and I hope this is proof the work we did together is making such a difference. I'm excited for the work ahead.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/6090?t=11&akid=7950%2E868730%2EB_b1ah)
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: What’s The Press Got Against Melania Trump?
body:
What's The Press Got Against Melania Trump? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [What's The Press Got Against Melania Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-j/)
The First Lady's treatment by the mainstream press is, in my humble opinion, shameful. In this weeks' blog post, I explain how First Lady Melania Trump has been belittled, criticized, undermined and simply ignored! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Trump's Republican Rivals](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-d/)
An overwhelming majority of Republicans support Donald Trump's reelection to the presidency. But not all. I'm on the blog today talking about President Trump's Republican rivals and what I think their chances may be.

Click the link below to read this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [My Prediction - The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-u/)
So who's going to be Donald Trump's Democratic rival for the presidency this time around? The truth is, no one knows for sure. And Joe Biden has been the leader of the Democrat pack since even before he officially threw his hat into the ring back in April. But I think it's likely to be someone other than Joe. Here's my analysis.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A "Beautiful" Letter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-n/)
President Trump announced a few days ago that he'd received another letter from North Korea's dictator Kim Jong Un. Not only was it a letter, but it was a "beautiful" letter.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdauidd-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Democrats need to talk about climate change loudly, often, and with force because the stakes couldn't be higher.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I know it's late, but I had to share this. The very first question I got on the campaign trail was about the Green New Deal and how we can tackle the existential crisis of climate change in our lifetime. And, I just got off the stage at CNN's Climate Town Hall where Democrats dedicated an entire night to having a serious conversation about climate change. **Democrats need to talk about climate change loudly, often, and with force because the stakes couldn 't be higher.** If we want to seriously combat climate change, we need to have some seriously ambitious ideas. That's why I just released a $3 trillion plan to take this issue head-on and make the U.S. economy 100% carbon neutral by 2045. **[If you're with me on this, consider making a donation to my campaign today because, when I'm president, the U.S. will lead the world in this effort to fight climate change.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190904_cb_20190904-fr-CB-postTH-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** For communities like mine, climate change isn't some distant threat -- it's an urgent problem right now. And without immediate and decisive action, the toll will be unimaginable. We must act now. Let's go.
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190904_cb_20190904-fr-CB-postTH-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in New York City today, Thursday September 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
The Iowa caucuses are 5 months away -- and all candidate positioning is in a state of flux.

Come meet me today, September 5, and find out why my 'on-the-ground' strategy has resonated in all of Iowa, driving growing polling numbers and media coverage -- and how my targeted 'air campaign' will drive the next growth phase.
My reception today is at 6:00pm at US Grid Company (USCRDCO) located at 1177 Avenue of the Americas, 5th Floor (between 45th and 46th Streets).
To RSVP and donate online [please click here ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660829/95851267/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=)\- and if you cannot attend, please contribute [online here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660830/95851268/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=) or by check made out to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Please come to hear my message on how to win and to unite our nation!
Respectfully,
Joe

**_Jacob Worenklein, CEO, US Grid Company_** **_Cordially invites you to a Fundraiser Reception on Thursday, September 5, to support_
_Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak_** [Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660831/95851269/2128061837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798) wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, **former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak** has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and **“has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’”** The [editorial board of the Des Moines Register](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660832/95851270/-520002973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798) said, **“[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”**

[Vox called Joe](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660833/95851271/-1902359365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798) a **“maverick”** and **“an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.”**[National Review called him](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660834/95851272/-1828110372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798) **“the most interesting Democrat”** in the race.

Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an **experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years** , including in the **White House** as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly **2-to-1 Republican district where he was reelected without spending a dime on campaign ads**.

An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary. Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and [Plan for America](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660835/95851273/2016766251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798). Check out [JoeSestak.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660836/95851274/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=&emci=9269c58b-8fcf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=24d61c20-c8cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&ceid=250798). **Thursday, September 5th from 6:00 p.m. - 7:30 p.m.** **at US Grid Company (USGRDCO)
1177 Avenue of the Americas - 5th Floor
New York, NY 10036
[between 45th and 46th Streets]** **Requested Contribution Levels:**
**Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250** **To RSVP or contribute for this event,[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9660837/95851275/1298519058?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ2MWMyMC1jOGNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yKFhYCa-3-_mj7GtFVZab3Ng6d0K3Kg8L_qA0enQT3g=)** **You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing** a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302. **Questions: Email [reception@joesestak.com](mailto:reception@joesestak.com?subject=September%205th%20Reception%20in%20NYC) or call 610-757-5051**

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: It's the first day of school
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
All across our city, kids are preparing to head in for the first day of school.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dd3/1630b3eb/515492ae/5f54aca3/3056513578/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=722_org_em_lb")
Friend,
It's a big day here in New York City.
All across our city, kids are heading out for the first day of school. And though our son Dante turned 22 years old on Wednesday, Chirlane and I still remember waking him and his sister up on these mornings just like it was yesterday.
The best part about sending my children off to school back then was knowing they were prepared to get the best out of their education. Access to quality pre-K made a huge difference for our kids, and ultimately changed the lives of our family.
**That 's why my first goal as mayor was to provide free pre-K for every child in New York City -- and I did it.**
**[If you're a caregiver with a kid in the universal pre-K program or a kid who finished pre-school elsewhere, share your story of what early education has meant for you.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dd3/1630b3eb/515492ae/5f54aca3/3056513578/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=722_org_em_lb")**
Earlier this week, my political director shared that he was sending his daughter off to kindergarten. He provided you with a personal take on how Pre-K for All has made a difference for Elyse.
We asked people like you to do the same, and the responses that came back were inspiring. Hector from Staten Island said it was "very helpful." Jascena from the Bronx said that because both of her sons completed universal pre-K, they were ready to "read and write sentences" by the time they started school.
Patrick from Queens said, "I remember vividly how my kids' mom used to struggle to get our first son to attend half-day pre-K while also nursing two younger kids. Memories of this make universal pre-K a godsend. All of our kids deserve a quality universal pre-K if they are to function in today's world."
**[We'd love to hear more about how access to quality early education has impacted your family. Share your story here.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dd3/1630b3eb/515492ae/5f54aca3/3056513578/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyMiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/share-your-universal-pre-k-story?source=722_org_em_lb")**
**One of my first priorities as president will be to provide universal pre-K for every child** in the United States -- as well as universal 3-K and full-day kindergarten. To teach these students, **we'll also create 500,000 new teaching jobs** in the next ten years.
Every child in every corner of this country deserves the early education that will set them on a course to a brighter future. To all of the parents and caregivers that are sending their children off to school today: enjoy every minute of it. The time goes by too quickly -- but the earlier they start, the stronger they finish.
Happy learning,
Bill
PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dd3/1630b3eb/515492ae/5f54aca2/3056513578/VEsC/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21dd3/1630b3eb/515492ae/5f54aca1/3056513578/VEsD/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

name: Eric Trump
subject: President Trump is waiting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your hand-signed Keep America Great Hat. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3635a83b96ff1bab279d08c158d44f57a217f1b79d78cd323a05bb9a039a365bd9c62b790708dadfd5af74e8234cae0384727fb4255c7edc)

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Join Presidential Candidate, Joe Sestak, in Wayne tomorrow, Friday September 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Friend,

The Iowa caucuses are 5 months away -- and all candidate positioning is in a state of flux.

Come meet me tomorrow September 6, and find out why my 'on-the-ground' strategy has resonated in all of Iowa, driving growing polling numbers and media coverage -- and how my targeted 'air campaign' will drive the next growth phase.

My reception tomorrow is at 6:30pm at Margaret Kuo's Restaurant located at 175 Lancaster Avenue in Wayne.

To RSVP and donate online please click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception090619] - and if you cannot attend, please contribute online here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception090619] or by check made out to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.

Please come to hear my message on how to win and to unite our nation!

Respectfully,
Joe

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rob Armstrong, George Badey, Ed Chacker, Shelly Chauncey,
Mark and Karin Cofone, Andrea and Mark D’Ambra, Ken Dilloway, Larry Frame, Margaret Goodman, Grant Grissom, Elayne Howard, Bob Jarvis, Scott Jenkins, Janet Lis, Kevin Madden, William C. Miller, William E. Miller, Esq., David Moldoff, Jack Nachamkin, Gary Neights, Abu and Shelly Rahman, Richard Sternhell, Mark Turner & Ava Zandi

Cordially invite you to a Fundraiser reception to support
Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak

Pat Rynard of Iowa Starting Line [https://iowastartingline.com/2019/07/29/the-peculiar-surprisingly-effective-campaign-of-joe-sestak/] wrote that since announcing his candidacy June 23, former 3-star Admiral Joe Sestak has spent his time getting to know the people of Iowa and “has a unique story... Sestak is certainly the only person in the field who can say things like, ‘When I arrived in the Arabian Sea with my carrier battle group to begin the strikes against Afghanistan.’” The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[This] retired Navy admiral and former congressman impresses with experience, smarts and discipline....”

Vox called him [https://www.vox.com/policy-and-politics/2019/8/13/20680106/joe-sestak-2020-presidential-campaign-policies-admiral-navy-specter-obama-medicare-public-option] a “maverick” and “an anti-establishment Democrat who has beaten a Republican in a Republican district, he’s someone with military and foreign policy experience, and he has a deeply personal reason for his approach to health care reform: This is his record and he’s running on it.” National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

Joe aims to build a coalition that brings together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Joe is an experienced, independent leader who served in the Navy for 31 years , including in the White House as Director of Defense Policy for President Clinton, and in Congress when he represented Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District – a nearly 2-to-1 Republican district.

An independent-minded public servant, Joe refused to let former Republican Arlen Specter – who tried to humiliate Anita Hill during her testimony on sexual harassment by now-Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – run unopposed for the Senate. Joe beat the odds to win the primary.

Please come to hear why Joe inspires such passionate support across Iowa with his grassroots campaign and Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] . Check out JoeSestak.com [https://www.joesestak.com] .

Friday, September 6th, 6:30 p.m.
Margaret Kuo's Restaurant, 175 Lancaster Ave, Wayne, PA
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250 Backer: $100

To RSVP or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception090619]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing a check payable to "Joe Sestak for President" to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302

Questions: Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak for President
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6794a94b-90cf-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/397194a6-e9cf-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTcxOTRhNi1lOWNmLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uaMkTO-FjJLvXmNvNzocfmPvpmxRh_H1I30D0FXDQM0=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Tim Walz
subject: Let’s make Minnesota the “Education State”
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Hundreds of thousands of Minnesota students across our state went back to school this week. As a former public school teacher and a dad, this is always a meaningful time of year for me. Even though I'm not in front of a classroom this year, I approach every day in my job as a "teacher-governor." That's because the education of our children determines the future of our state. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)
---
My friend,
Hundreds of thousands of Minnesota students across our state went back to school this week. As a former public school teacher and a dad, this is always a meaningful time of year for me.
Even though I'm not in front of a classroom this year, I approach every day in my job as a "teacher-governor." That's because the education of our children determines the future of our state.
Every student in Minnesota deserves to learn in the best schools in the country with caring, qualified teachers. But as I travel around the state, I see how the quality of a student's education is too often dependent on their race or zip code.
Disparities in our educational system based on geography, race, or economic status hold back not only our students, but our entire state from reaching its full potential. It's unacceptable.
**We must make Minnesota the "Education State" for all children -- no matter who they are or where they live. **I'm going to work every day to get the job done, but I need to know you're with me.
[**Will you commit to doing what it takes to build the best education system in the country? Join me and add your name for Minnesota students today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)**
If we're going to be successful, every politician, every community, and every Minnesotan must value our teachers, our principals, our mentors, our paraprofessionals, our bus drivers and, of course, our students.
Education is the great equalizer of society. Education unleashes untapped potential. Education conjures the magic of promising beginnings and the grace of second chances.
[**Our children are counting on us. Please add your name today and let 's work together to make Minnesota the "Education State" for every student in every zip code.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)**
Have a great school year,
Tim Walz
**[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/NnpQQNAq-5jc9vBXRn5lUZA6mx8z9CRGFxqh1LfOZsg=/1PqQN_rKWPfg0bmSo7Sc-7lel0MVe511lemytmgPMuU=)**

---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Steve King Drinks Toilet Water?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]
Peter,

Steve King just released his latest publicity stunt: a video rationalizing the inhumane treatment of immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers at the border. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]

We’ve seen children torn from the arms of their mothers, locked up in cages, and forced to sleep on concrete floors with tin foil blankets while lacking proper food and hygiene. We’ve heard sworn testimony of Border Patrol agents telling people to drink from the toilets because the water fountain was broken. We’ve seen a study -- published just yesterday -- confirming that these horrific conditions are leaving children traumatized, with severe psychological and emotional deficits and PTSD.

This is the heartlessness that Steve King is attempting to excuse. And in a callous attempt at humor, Steve King drank toilet water at one of the detention facilities in El Paso to prove that our treatment of the men, women, and children at the border is perfectly acceptable (it’s not).

Click here to watch Steve King's publicity stunt for yourself. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]

There is no excuse for forcing any human being to drink out of a toilet. There is no excuse for the inhumane treatment of those who are fleeing violence from their home countries. We are better than this.

Our campaign is about treating all people with dignity, respect, and compassion. That’s what we do as Americans. And that’s what we do as people of this shared planet.

This is important -- we need you with us. Watch the video and chip in whatever you can so we can replace Steve King. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]

Join me and let's stand up for what’s right,
J.D. Scholten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdrink]

Scholten4Iowa

Sioux City, IA 51102

name: Daniel Barash, Campaign Manager
subject: State of the race (read the memo I just gave the team)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
this is a longer email, but it's incredibly important | |
---
| Michael Bennet is running for president to build opportunity for all Americans and clean up government corruption. He needs your help to secure his spot on future debate stages. Will you make a contribution today? [**CHIP IN HERE >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
* * *
Friends, I just shared this memo about the campaign with our staff - what we're up against, where we stand now, and our plan forward. I wanted to share it with you, too, because you are a critical part of this team.

[I hope you'll give me a few minutes to explain how we can win the long game and then make a contribution to join our fight.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da1/3788180749/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thanks for reading,

Daniel Barash
Campaign Manager, Bennet for America

[**Where we stand now:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Many candidates in this race have been preparing a presidential run for years. They've raised immense amounts of money through their own super PACs and run the gamut of the cable news circuit - being seen and heard as often as possible.

Michael never planned to have a career in politics, let alone run for president - in fact, he was known as the "accidental senator". It was only upon being appointed to the Senate and then serving for 10 years that he realized just how backward everything is in Washington - and what he can do to fix it.

[Believe it or not, it's still early in this race.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Compared to years prior, this election got started much earlier. Fueled by the early start of the DNC debates and heightened media attention around early polls, there's a false impression that the race has solidified. Our internal polling shows support for the current frontrunners is soft.

The truth is that most voters haven't made their final choice or still support multiple candidates.

[Will you make a contribution today to help us send a strong message that Michael is in this for the long haul?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da1/3788180749/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
[**What we 're up against:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

It's important to understand what the DNC is doing to narrow this field of qualified candidates before many voters have truly made a decision of their own.

The DNC's arbitrary rules have created a reality show with unending coverage of zingers and one-liners rather than real policy and proposals to fix our country. In no way does that coverage or stifling of debate strengthen our party or enhance our ability to defeat Trump.

For reference, the first debate in 2015 was in October. To be included, a candidate had to achieve an average of at least 1% in three nationally recognized polls released between August 1 and October 10. What they're doing now is unprecedented.

Along with that, the DNC's fundraising criteria is an embarrassment to the party that wants to end _Citizens United_. If we wanted to be the party that set up rules that excluded people and gamed the system in favor of billionaires, we'd be Republicans.

[Right now, Michael is staying focused on what matters most: talking to voters and beating Trump. But we need your help to send the DNC a message that voters decide our nominee -- not operatives in a backroom.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da1/3788180749/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
[**Our plan forward:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Is it naive to believe that at this moment in American history we can restore public trust in our republic? Is it naive to believe that elected officials can live up to high expectations of that trust? Some may think so.

_We disagree._

Michael's track record matches his positions over the last decade because he's not announcing policies for the purpose of campaigning. You won't see him flip-flopping on universal healthcare because he's always supported union-negotiated private plans and a strong public option.

Michael won't back down from passing a lifetime ban on members of Congress becoming lobbyists after they leave office because he knows it's absolutely crucial.

We can fix our broken politics, clean up corruption, and strengthen our democracy - it all starts here with this campaign.

When it comes down to the issues that matter, Michael's policies are in line with primary voters. From universal pre-K and reimagining high school and community colleges, to comprehensive immigration reform and achieving universal health care coverage.

Voters are looking for an authentic and steady candidate who has the toughness and the vision to the beat Donald Trump. That candidate is Michael Bennet.

[Michael is going to win this election like he's won the rest - by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country. We need your support today. Will you make a contribution today and join the fight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafda/134673f2/be1a5db/69962da2/3788180749/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

clean_body: this is a longer email, but it's incredibly important | | | Michael Bennet is running for president to build opportunity for all Americans and clean up government corruption. He needs your help to secure his spot on future debate stages. Will you make a contribution today? "" * Friends, I just shared this memo about the campaign with our staff - what we're up against, where we stand now, and our plan forward. I wanted to share it with you, too, because you are a critical part of this team. "" | "" Thanks for reading, Daniel Barash Campaign Manager, Bennet for America "" Many candidates in this race have been preparing a presidential run for years. They've raised immense amounts of money through their own super PACs and run the gamut of the cable news circuit - being seen and heard as often as possible. Michael never planned to have a career in politics, let alone run for president - in fact, he was known as the "accidental senator". It was only upon being appointed to the Senate and then serving for 10 years that he realized just how backward everything is in Washington - and what he can do to fix it. "" Compared to years prior, this election got started much earlier. Fueled by the early start of the DNC debates and heightened media attention around early polls, there's a false impression that the race has solidified. Our internal polling shows support for the current frontrunners is soft. The truth is that most voters haven't made their final choice or still support multiple candidates. "" | "" "" It's important to understand what the DNC is doing to narrow this field of qualified candidates before many voters have truly made a decision of their own. The DNC's arbitrary rules have created a reality show with unending coverage of zingers and one-liners rather than real policy and proposals to fix our country. In no way does that coverage or stifling of debate strengthen our party or enhance our ability to defeat Trump. For reference, the first debate in 2015 was in October. To be included, a candidate had to achieve an average of at least 1% in three nationally recognized polls released between August 1 and October 10. What they're doing now is unprecedented. Along with that, the DNC's fundraising criteria is an embarrassment to the party that wants to end Citizens United. If we wanted to be the party that set up rules that excluded people and gamed the system in favor of billionaires, we'd be Republicans. "" | "" "" Is it naive to believe that at this moment in American history we can restore public trust in our republic? Is it naive to believe that elected officials can live up to high expectations of that trust? Some may think so. We disagree. Michael's track record matches his positions over the last decade because he's not announcing policies for the purpose of campaigning. You won't see him flip-flopping on universal healthcare because he's always supported union-negotiated private plans and a strong public option. Michael won't back down from passing a lifetime ban on members of Congress becoming lobbyists after they leave office because he knows it's absolutely crucial. We can fix our broken politics, clean up corruption, and strengthen our democracy - it all starts here with this campaign. When it comes down to the issues that matter, Michael's policies are in line with primary voters. From universal pre-K and reimagining high school and community colleges, to comprehensive immigration reform and achieving universal health care coverage. Voters are looking for an authentic and steady candidate who has the toughness and the vision to the beat Donald Trump. That candidate is Michael Bennet. "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thank you for being with us, Daniel | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Impressive impact
body:
| | Peter, I’m so grateful for the support of our donors and faithful prayer warriors so far in 2019. Together, we are uniting Christians across the nation to put their faith into action and stand for biblical values in the voting booth. The impact is impressive:
* Reach Christians in 85% of the zip codes across America with My Faith Votes tools
* Equip Christians with voter resources for all 85,000 elections in 2019 and 100,000 elections in 2020
* Grow our social media following by 245% on YouTube, 167% on Instagram, and increase our impressions on Facebook by 47%.

Please take a few minutes to [review our 2019 Impact Update and see the full impact of your support](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFjSTo1o0fhnt69d4RSnBn5iUQfJHU8S4ddjJJ8toj6wBA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=1). When you do, I know you’ll join us in thanking the Lord for His continued blessing on America. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFjSTo1o0fhnt69d4RSnBn5iUQfJHU8S4ddjJJ8toj6wBA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRmLLymUKqiZFVFbCVlmLFjSTo1o0fhnt69d4RSnBn5iUQfJHU8S4ddjJJ8toj6wBA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=3) With the 2020 elections ramping up and just around the corner, your partnership with My Faith Votes is now more critical than ever. Every single dollar you’ve donated to My Faith Votes is prayerfully being put to work to see millions more Christians pray fervently for our leaders, think biblically about the issues, take action, and vote in every election for biblical values. We can’t let up on the gas pedal now. There is so much at stake for religious freedom, marriage and family, and the protection of the unborn. [Please join us and donate today to see 90-million Christians bring the solutions of our faith to every single election](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190905apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=4). [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190905apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=5) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=6)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190905com01nd&n=10)

name: Booker HQ
subject: 24 hours to double your donation. Here's how:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- You probably see a lot of talk about _matching_ donations in emails like this. So we wanted to pull back the curtain a bit and tell you what we mean when we say the word "match." From time to time, we reach out to supporters who've already chipped in to build this campaign and see who's willing to chip in again to inspire another supporter to make their very first donation. Those "matching donors" aren't millionaire max-out donors. They're the local elementary school teacher or maybe even your postal worker donating $5 or $10 at a time. Then, we use those small-dollar donations to match brand new donors' first contribution. We've learned that people who are on the fence about chipping in really appreciate that another supporter is there challenging them to make that first donation. Last month, when we reached out, Karen in Columbus, Ohio, chipped in to match the first-ever donation of Patricia, a teacher in Michigan. **We reached out yesterday to some Cory supporters, and a lot of our donors are ready to match your donation today.[What do you say -- will you rise to the challenge and chip in right now?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190904-match-ndnr?refcode=em_fr_20190905_CG_20190905-fr-CG-match-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This kind of grassroots growth is what this campaign is all about. It happens one person at a time. Unlike other campaigns, we don't have the ability to raise millions overnight. And we refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs, or federal lobbyists, or wealthy execs from oil or pharmaceutical companies. So we're counting on people like you to keep this operation growing. I'm sure that not every time you hear about an exclusive match in emails like this, they're always on the up and up -- with some mysterious wealthy donors promising to triple your donation. But that's not what we're building here. (And I can tell you because it's my team running the numbers.) clean_body: | | | | Team -- You probably see a lot of talk about matching donations in emails like this. So we wanted to pull back the curtain a bit and tell you what we mean when we say the word "match." From time to time, we reach out to supporters who've already chipped in to build this campaign and see who's willing to chip in again to inspire another supporter to make their very first donation. Those "matching donors" aren't millionaire max-out donors. They're the local elementary school teacher or maybe even your postal worker donating $5 or $10 at a time. Then, we use those small-dollar donations to match brand new donors' first contribution. We've learned that people who are on the fence about chipping in really appreciate that another supporter is there challenging them to make that first donation. Last month, when we reached out, Karen in Columbus, Ohio, chipped in to match the first-ever donation of Patricia, a teacher in Michigan. We reached out yesterday to some Cory supporters, and a lot of our donors are ready to match your donation today. "=" This kind of grassroots growth is what this campaign is all about. It happens one person at a time. Unlike other campaigns, we don't have the ability to raise millions overnight. And we refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs, or federal lobbyists, or wealthy execs from oil or pharmaceutical companies. So we're counting on people like you to keep this operation growing. I'm sure that not every time you hear about an exclusive match in emails like this, they're always on the up and up -- with some mysterious wealthy donors promising to triple your donation. But that's not what we're building here. (And I can tell you because it's my team running the numbers.) This match is the real deal. Peter - The Affordable Care Act (ACA) is under threat yet again. Currently, the Trump administration is allowing states to sell health insurance plans that do not protect Americans with pre-existing conditions - and more than a dozen Republican attorneys general have filed a lawsuit in hopes of dismantling the ACA entirely.

[The GOP will stop at nothing in their attacks on affordable health care. That's why we must act now. Add your name and tell Congress to protect coverage for Americans with pre-existing conditions! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GYhMLTrpDe3sof4yTtAWmjMCPPOrRm-D1-9Pl2weIY=/1hAOl__22aGfebFN6fedYtfcAuHcGOG2hFFS0u5CD5Y=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190905_1_1%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)

We won't let millions of Americans have the rug ripped out from underneath them. It's time the GOP stop playing politics with our health care - Americans' lives and well-being are on the line, Peter.

[Make your voice heard and demand Congress take action to protect Americans with pre-existing conditions ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GYhMLTrpDe3sof4yTtAWmjMCPPOrRm-D1-9Pl2weIY=/1hAOl__22aGfebFN6fedYtfcAuHcGOG2hFFS0u5CD5Y=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190905_1_1%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)

Thanks for stepping up,

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GYhMLTrpDe3sof4yTtAWmjMCPPOrRm-D1-9Pl2weIY=/1hAOl__22aGfebFN6fedYtfcAuHcGOG2hFFS0u5CD5Y=?code=thompson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmt-aca-up%3Frefcode%3DMT_EM_JA_WL_190905_1_1%26amount%3D10.00%26recurring%3Dtrue)

[_**Will you take one minute of your time to complete our September Priorities Survey?**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dc2d/693b8b0a/45578579/72de9193/3664401645/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/issues-survey/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: The Republican Monopoly on WV’s Government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the West Virginia Democratic Party - http://www
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/Dem_FightAgainstInjustice_600px-v4.jpg]

Dear concerned voter,

2020 is the most important election of our lifetime. Now more than ever, our nation faces issues that threaten our very way of life and the principles on which America was founded. Donald Trump has intentionally divided our country, deflecting and shifting the blame for his terrible failures and corrupt schemes. He has used the trusted public office of the Presidency to spread hate and give credibility to racist and xenophobic fringe groups, whose goal is to destroy the America we know and love.

In WV, we band together in tough times to support each other. The labor movement was born in the coal mines of our state, and that movement remains strong today in our classrooms as teachers fight for better working conditions and resources for our public school system. We have a lot to be proud of, but we also have a lot of room for improvement.

Trump’s lies have preyed on our people at a time when we were the most vulnerable, and down-ballot Republicans have fallen in line to support him. Meanwhile, our people are sick and hurting as the opioid crisis ravages our state, unchecked by the Republican monopoly on our government.

We need your help to fight back against injustice here at ground-zero for the Trump movement. Your donation will help candidates who stand for working families and against the Trump GOP. If we hope to win nationwide, we must unite to defeat this evil and change the system together.

Can you chip in to fight the Trump GOP?

DONATE NOW: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv-dem-fight-against-injustice

Thank you for your time and support.

Best regards,

Belinda Biafore

Chair, WV Democratic Party

Paid for by the West Virginia Democratic Party - http://www.wvdems.org/
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
P.O. Box 11926 Charleston, WV 25339

|

---

Peter,

**In less than 48 hours we have to report our campaign fundraising numbers.** It's critical that our report is strong and shows that we have the grassroots support and momentum to win this race -- **and we need to raise another $10,000 by Friday night.**

Fortunately, we're getting a huge boost because a group of generous supporters has agreed to MATCH EVERY DOLLAR -- but only until tomorrow at midnight when our report is due.

**Will you please chip in for the first time to help us meet our urgent $10,000 goal and show that our momentum is still growing?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444c9/4065110441/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?express_lane=true&refcode=20190905nd__239__&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444cf/4065110441/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?express_lane=true&refcode=20190905nd__239__&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444cd/4065110441/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?express_lane=true&refcode=20190905nd__239__&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444c3/4065110441/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?express_lane=true&refcode=20190905nd__239__&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444c1/4065110441/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?express_lane=true&refcode=20190905nd__239__&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557aa3/ad6dc73/14c06dce/db444c7/4065110441/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzOSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-48hrs?refcode=20190905nd__239__")**
**Recent polls show that Andy is ahead -- but we can 't afford to relax for even a second.** We have to keep pushing with all our strength over the next two months to reach every voter across Kentucky with Andy's positive message and spread the word about his plans to improve our schools, expand affordable health care, and create more good-paying jobs -- and we need _your_ help to do it.

Unlike Matt Bevin, Andy doesn't have super-rich mega-donors in his back pocket. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Ivanka Meets Guaidó Aides, Announces $120 Million in US Aid for Displaced Venezuelans
body:
"Ivanka Trump met with aides to Venezuelan National Assembly President Juan Guaidó in Colombia on Wednesday to underscore support for a..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=99b26470ba&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Ivanka Meets Guaidó Aides, Announces $120 Million in US Aid for Displaced Venezuelans**

“Ivanka Trump met with aides to Venezuelan National Assembly President Juan Guaidó in Colombia on Wednesday to underscore support for a ‘democratic transition in Venezuela’ and offer $120 million in U.S. assistance to neighboring countries under strain from a refugee crisis,” Michael Wilner reports for _McClatchy DC_.

“President Donald Trump’s eldest daughter and senior adviser joined the USAID Administrator Mark Green and Deputy Secretary of State John Sullivan at a migrant shelter in Cúcuta, a Colombian city bordering Venezuela, to announce the new package, which brings total U.S. aid to Venezuelan refugees in the region to $376 million.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a414379614&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Company payrolls surged by 195,000 in August, well above Wall Street estimates,” according to a new report from ADP and Moody’s Analytics, Jeff Cox reports for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30539ec75d&e=3ee4985eea). “Economists surveyed by Dow Jones had been looking for a gain of just 140,000 following July’s 142,000 . . . Companies with 50 to 499 employees were the largest growth sector.”
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration on Wednesday announced it was awarding $1.8 billion in grants to help states and communities continue to battle the opioid epidemic, part of the administration’s broader effort to drive down overdose deaths and addiction,” Stephanie Armour writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=933cc641ab&e=3ee4985eea). “My administration is determined to use every resource at our disposal to smash the grip of addiction,” President Trump said.
---
|
---
| “Disgraced former FBI official and brand-new CNN contributor Andrew McCabe will headline a fundraiser later this month for the Pennsylvania Democratic Party,” Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57414706fb&e=3ee4985eea). “Remember: A Justice Department inspector general report released last year found McCabe leaked sensitive information about the Clinton email investigation to members of the press, then lied about it to investigators.” Adams adds that “this scheduled Democratic fundraiser just adds another layer to an already awkward situation for CNN.”
---
|
---
| “A Honduran national in the United States illegally has been accused of raping his 15-year-old stepdaughter in suburban Maryland, the seventh such case in the area over the past five weeks,” Sam Dorman reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bdecaafaad&e=3ee4985eea). “Since July 25, Montgomery County Police have arrested at least seven confirmed undocumented immigrants for alleged rapes and sexual assaults. Montgomery County Executive Marc Elrich signed an executive order last month designating the county a ‘sanctuary’ jurisdiction.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=122064846e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=090d34e3d8&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=bf40c2b185)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

**The DNC will NOT sanction a Presidential debate on climate change or allow candidates to participate in their own.** **But here 's an update you need to see:** Thanks to thousands of people ---
The first two rounds of Democratic debates gave twenty candidates just MINUTES to talk about climate change -- Some didn't get a chance to mention their climate plans at all!
This is why each Presidential candidate had **40 minutes** to discuss their plan to address our climate crisis during last night's Climate Change Town Hall.
After years of Donald Trump's and Republicans' efforts to obstruct, roll-back, and undermine any action on climate change, it is critical that our next President has an aggressive plan to address climate change.
It's only due to thousands of activists like you that last night's town hall happened. [**So we want to know -- did you watch to see which candidate was the best able to address our climate crisis?**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f3/4bd7760e/411d756e/77e15a12/620866034/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+So+we+want+to+know++did+you+watch+to+see&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1")

---

314 Action

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f3/4bd7760e/411d756e/77e15a1c/620866034/VEsHBg/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f3/4bd7760e/411d756e/77e15a1b/620866034/VEsHAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1")
If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f3/4bd7760e/411d756e/77e15a1a/620866034/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_ClimateTownHallUpdate_U1_X1")

Please join us for a fundraising reception honoring Sen. Jim Gray at the Revolution Tap Room in Rochester next Tuesday, Sept 10 from 5:30PM - 7:30PM FEATURING SPECIAL GUEST GOV. CHRIS SUNUNU! When: Tuesday Sept 10 from 5:30PM- 7:30PM Where: Revolution Tap Room - 61 North Main Street, Rochester Tickets are $50 per person Sponsorships District Level: $2500 City Level: $1000 Ward Level: $500 Neighborhood Level: $250 To RSVP, please contact Matt Mayberry at [mattmayberrynh@gmail.com](mailto:mattmayberrynh@gmail.com) or [603-969-7077](tel:603-969-7077). name: Laura Loomer
subject: President Trump’s Biggest Defender Endorses Laura!
body:
It’s rare that prominent personalities and politicians endorse a candidate before a primary, it takes guts and that’s why I’m so grateful for each endorsement that I receive for my run to represent Florida’s 21st District.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637609-19b1dd01a1-9526101d8c)
Patriot,

It’s rare that prominent personalities and politicians endorse a candidate before a primary, it takes guts and that’s why I’m so grateful for each endorsement that I receive for my run to represent Florida’s 21st District.

Not long after I announced my candidacy, Rep. Paul Gosar became the first member of Congress to back my run . . . which was amazing!

And late last night I received my first endorsement from a media personality

Last week, I appeared on Wayne Allyn Root’s radio program and he was gracious enough to give me a significant amount of time to talk to his listeners.

I’m sure you’ve have seen or heard Wayne over the years. He is the host of the “Wayne Allyn Root Show” on NewsMax TV’s primetime spot, and works just as hard on his daily radio program on USA Radio, “Wayne Allyn Root: Raw & Unfiltered.”

Two weeks ago, President Donald Trump tweeted in support of Wayne Allyn Root, and thanked him for his support. As predicted, the FAKE NEWS media went crazy and attacked both President Trump and Wayne Allyn Root.

And late last night when I opened an email from Wayne that was sent to the campaign, I was so incredibly grateful.

In typical Wayne Allyn Root style, he offered a high-energy endorsement for my run against Democrat Lois Frankel:
> “I ENTHUSIASTICALLY endorse Laura Loomer for Florida’s 21st Congressional District. I can spot a winner, and I can spot a fighter. Laura is both! She will represent the interests of Floridians and bring her values and work ethic to Washington to take on Democrats and the socialist left! I’m proud to stand with her ALL THE WAY to 2020!”
Each prominent endorser like Wayne Root and Rep Gosar gives a nudge for another to step forward to offer their support.

That’s why it’s so important to me that we show as much appreciation as possible to Wayne – in a way that others can see.

If you’re still on Twitter (because you know I’m not), [**please click here to send the following thank you Tweet to Wayne Root**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637610-86583fe492-9526101d8c).

> [TWEET: Thank you **@RealWayneRoot** for your endorsement of **#LauraLoomerforCongress!** You gained a new fan by standing with Laura in her run to flip Florida 21 from Blue to Red! Just like you said on your show, Laura is going to be the Squad’s worst nightmare!](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637610-86583fe492-9526101d8c)
If you’re able to [send that tweet](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637610-86583fe492-9526101d8c) (and feel free to make it your own), please give Wayne a follow on Twitter – you’ll love his tweets.

Thanks again for all that you do, and if you’re able to right now, [**please take a moment to send a quick donation to keep the campaign moving ahead**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637609-19b1dd01a1-9526101d8c). Every dollar counts whether it’s [**$10, $25, $50 or more**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347002-802646-4637609-19b1dd01a1-9526101d8c).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Laura Loomer
Candidate for Florida’s 21st Congressional District

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Brianna Nelson
subject: It’s great to meet you, folks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
It's great to meet you, folks!

My name is Brianna, I'm a junior in high school and I'm one of the _(many!)_ interns here on the Margaret Good campaign.

Now that school has started, my daily routine looks like this: Go to school, get out at 1pm, finish my homework as fast as I can, and then go to the Margaret Good office and work until it closes.

I'm giving my all to this campaign because I want to help make the change that my friends and I want. I worry about climate change and what the world is going to look like when I'm an adult. None of our current leaders have done anything about it, but finding solutions to climate change is one of Margaret's priorities.

[**We need to help her get elected so she can be our voice. Can you support our campaign with a grassroots donation so Margaret can win and fight for us in Washington? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

It's not just with climate change that our leaders are failing us -- there are so many other issues that I'm worried about, like health care and public education. In the state legislature, Margaret has been a champion for both and I know she will be in Washington, too.

I may only be 16, but I know the time to make change is now. And I can tell you, there are many other young people in our district that are dedicated to helping this campaign succeed. Before I joined the campaign, everyone at my school talked about Margaret's campaign and it seems like almost half my grade (not joking) has volunteered for it. Currently, over 33 interns are working on the campaign -- more than a year before the election! I think that really underscores how much we want this change!

**What we 're trying to accomplish is big though, and we can't do it alone.**

[**So, I 'm asking you, friends: Can you make a grassroots contribution to keep our campaign running on all cylinders? Anywhere and anyway you can help would make a huge difference! >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

| [$5 for pens and clipboards »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
[$25 for a tank of gas »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
[$50 for voter contact materials »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
[$100 for our first office »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
[Or, a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

For instance, did you know that online grassroots contributions help fund every aspect of our campaign? From buying clipboards for volunteers, to launching ads that share Margaret's message, to keeping our office doors open, we can't do any of it without your support!

In just a few short weeks, I've picked up a lot of new skills -- _like how to talk to supporters on the phone; how to research issues; and how to provide support at events._

**I am making friends, learning a lot, and having fun. But what will stay with me from this experience is something I 've learned directly from Margaret's leadership: Big wins, the kind worth celebrating for our entire community, cannot be achieved alone. **

[**Friends, only together can we elect representation that works for my family and yours. Help us build a winning coalition of grassroots supporters today by contributing here with a donation of any size. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

********[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
---

Thanks for taking the time to read my message! I couldn't be more proud to be part of a team that values and respects each and every volunteer, intern, and supporter.

Hope to see you on the trail!
_Brianna Nelson_

P.S. Check out our whole intern class enjoying team pizza! You can't see me, because I'm behind my tall friend Gwyn :(

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/EJSVjwdJq6SbNSb34C_vpRPlWxf5gQblsRON5AMTWas=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

** **

********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/sDEk4_4ZfcEVkt_GOGxy9Vb30tOGlRuuEFuxDFznE4A=/ZyzUZAXW1dhgnhFxEWTLlNvTvsDjuhVwYFwQ0_UPfGg=?refcode=em_fr_2019.09.05_b1_bn_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)********
