name: Research Team, SaraGideon.com
subject: Spotlight: Susan Collins' vote on Trump's tax plan
body:
Get the facts:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dfc/4bef7a87/68f4a589/287f1dae/919845637/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Hi there - it's Sara Gideon's research team.
Since you're an important part of our team, we wanted to include you on our recent memo shining a spotlight on Susan Collins' vote for the Trump tax bill.
Read the memo below, and then make a donation at this link:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/DefeatCollins](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dfc/4bef7a87/68f4a589/287f1dad/919845637/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190905-full")**
Thanks for staying informed!
Sincerely,
The Research Team

* * *

To: Gideon Campaign Team
Subject: Susan Collins' "YES" vote on Trump tax plan
After Donald Trump's inauguration, Republicans in Congress immediately proposed sweeping tax cuts for the wealthy and corporations.
Susan Collins served as a critical "Yes" vote, and Trump's tax cuts for the wealthy were signed into law.
**Republicans _claimed_ tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans would lead to economic growth for all.**
**FALSE:** Economists say the cuts did NOT lead to changes in overall economic growth, business investment, or worker pay.
**Republicans _claimed_ the tax cuts would pay for themselves.**
**FALSE:** The Congressional Research Service found the tax package was responsible for at most 5% of what would have been needed to pay for themselves.
**Susan Collins _claimed_ the tax cuts would lower the national debt.**
**FALSE:** Their plan will add an estimated nearly $2 trillion to the national deficit over a decade.
Trump's tax plan did nothing but put more money in the pockets of the wealthiest Americans, and Susan Collins supported it.

* * *

**Susan Collins has shown time and time again that she puts Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump before Mainers.**
**Chip in to defeat her and elect Sara Gideon to the U.S. Senate.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dfc/4bef7a87/68f4a589/287f1dad/919845637/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MDUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190905-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dfc/4bef7a87/68f4a589/287f1dac/919845637/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dfc/4bef7a87/68f4a589/287f1da3/919845637/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Derrick=20Dickey=2C=20Senior=20Strategist?=
subject: Where Things Stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
| |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=708b0120f7&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
After an uncomfortably close election in 2018, Georgia was already a top battleground state.** **[ Now,** our state is ground zero in the fight for the majority** in the United States Senate.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bfdb930a2c&e=02cd889ad3)

Last week, Senator Isakson announced that he will resign at the end of 2019. That means** BOTH of Georgia’s Senate seats will be on the ballot **with President Trump in 2020**.**

We do not yet know who Governor Kemp will appoint to the open seat, but it is clear that** BOTH David and the new Senator will be top targets of the radical left.**

With this new opportunity, **National ****Democrats are going to use every resource at their disposal to relentlessly attack David, flip both Senate seats, and defeat President Trump. **[That's why we need your help now more than ever.](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=8ab363b360&e=02cd889ad3)

**Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and failed gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams are especially motivated. **Both desperately want to deliver our state for their out-of-touch megadonors. Schumer knows his best chance for becoming Majority Leader is winning two Senate seats in one election. And Abrams has already raised at least $4 million to train hundreds of “warriors” in Georgia.

We must be **prepared to compete in this hypercharged political environment. **You have been helping us share David’s powerful message and create early momentum. But the coming weeks are the most critical yet.

Several Democrats are mobilizing to run. Georgia is receiving even more attention from the national liberal media. Big donors who already planned to spend millions are doubling down on their investment.

**We’re up against a massive effort, one unlike any we have ever seen before. We won’t win without you.**

While a lot has changed since last week, one thing remains the same. **David is working alongside President Trump to lead the greatest economic turnaround in modern history**. Your support is absolutely critical to victory in 2020 and keeping our winning agenda on track.

Team Perdue joins all of Georgia in wishing Senator Isakson the very best in his retirement. However, our fight is not over and the stakes just got even higher. **The Senate majority hangs in the balance right here in Georgia.**

Derrick Dickey
Senior Strategist
Perdue For Senate

subject: 5 Eyes. 5 Arms. 4 Legs. All American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Florida Congressman Brian Mast's tweet welcoming fellow combat veterans to Congress got a lot of attention shortly after it was posted reaching....... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/5-eyes-5-arms-4-legs-all-american?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dd0cca96c4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Viral Tweet Spotlights Three American Heroes Coming to Indiana!**
Did you catch this viral [tweet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b47f76527&e=1acd9bb3d6) from back in January spotlighting three American patriots?

Florida Congressman Brian Mast's tweet welcoming fellow combat veterans Jim Baird and Dan Crenshaw to Congress got a lot of attention shortly after it was posted, reaching 14,000 retweets and nearly 53,000 likes.

**Mast's[tweet](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd79401f46&e=1acd9bb3d6) **stated,**** "5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American. Welcome to Congress Jim Baird & Dan Crenshaw."

We’re so very excited that we’ll be welcoming Congressmen Mast, Baird and Crenshaw to Indiana for [Team Holcomb's annual Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd65295dfc&e=1acd9bb3d6) on **Monday, October 14th, 2019**. And you’re invited to join us to hear them talk about their patriotism and service to our country, as well as hear from state leaders like Governor Eric Holcomb!

We're so proud of these three heroes, and hope you can join us. Seats and tables are filling up quickly, so if you plan to join us for this special event, make sure you secure your spot now!
---

name: Tim
subject: no more left and right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Folks,

There are some issues that transcend politics -- a loved one getting sick, losing your job, senseless acts of gun violence. If you ever experience any of these things, party lines suddenly don't seem to matter.

Unfortunately, right now we're living in a time when every issue is boxed into "left" or "right."

But I'm fighting to change that -- because at the end of the day, it makes little difference whether you're a Democrat or a Republican as long as you stand for the important issues that impact all of us as Americans.

I want the national conversation around these issues to change -- less talk of "left" or "right" and more talk of **new** and **better**.

[**Can you contribute $3 today to help me get on the debate stage in October so we can start changing the conversation?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190905_2_6&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+contribute+ask+today+to+help+me+&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190905_2_6&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190905_2_6")

name: Team Stanton
subject: "we will always protect patients with preexisting conditions"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Yesterday, Greg wrote to you about the Trump Administration's efforts to undermine protections for Americans with preexisting conditions, a key feature of the Affordable Care Act.

Yet, just a few months ago, President Trump had this to say about protecting preexisting conditions...

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/X2aHaOE37f106xEEN4h4ukoeFAlFz9RIJTjniyWlfRE=/lVUpGSlRUXb5vEVBNnXC09KTIV_xIJa6-jDsYzygYCA=?code=stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3Dx_preexistingconditionsJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

**Look, this issue is far too important to let this Administration get away with flip-flopping on its promises to the American people. **

Greg knows that millions of Americans with preexisting conditions depend on this provision of the Affordable Care Act to access the healthcare they need, which is why he is working hard in Congress to keep these vital protections in place.

[**Will you join Greg in calling on Congress to keep protections for Americans with preexisting conditions?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/X2aHaOE37f106xEEN4h4ukoeFAlFz9RIJTjniyWlfRE=/lVUpGSlRUXb5vEVBNnXC09KTIV_xIJa6-jDsYzygYCA=?code=stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3Dx_preexistingconditionsJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/X2aHaOE37f106xEEN4h4ukoeFAlFz9RIJTjniyWlfRE=/lVUpGSlRUXb5vEVBNnXC09KTIV_xIJa6-jDsYzygYCA=?code=stanton&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcampaignlaunch2020%3Frefcode%3Dx_preexistingconditionsJA%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dauto)

Thank you,

\-- _Team Stanton _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Gravel=202020?=
subject: Current Affairs
body:
One of our favorite magazines is trying to expand and needs your help. Plus, an update on merch and the Gravel Institute. | | |
# An update from us at Gravel HQ
---
| | Hello, We hope everyone has been well since the end of the Gravel 2020 end. It was an extremely fun campaign to run, and to think that this ragtag effort for an 89-year-old with positions solidly outside the political mainstream got several times the donations of a senator, several congresspeople, governors, and the mayor of the most populous city in the country—that it even qualified for the debates!—continues to astound. (And anytime tells you we “didn’t have enough support in the polls,” tell them that we reached the threshold in 28 polls. It’s just a question of which the DNC recognized.) A quick update: yes, merchandise has been taking a very long time. Everything has now been produced and will be shipping shortly. We are managing pins ourselves; every pin is currently in an apartment in New York City, and as soon as the stamps we order have arrived they’ll be ready to go. All other merchandise is getting handled by a firm that will start the last stage of fulfillment shortly. Please email me if your item doesn't arrive. We are sorry about the wait—a bit longer than we expected. Henry and I have been on vacation; we’ve been crafting our plans for what form the Gravel Institute will take. We have a working plan we’ll be developing and releasing upon completion. We think you’ll be very happy with what we came up with—we think we’ve found a very useful space in the broader ecosystem of leftism that will benefit the causes Sen. Gravel is passionate about. Our goal, really, is to use the Institute to assist in the quiet, oft-unsung work of building progressive infrastructure—the very institutions that have allowed the right to seize control of this country. (We're actually going to be meeting with the senator later this month to finalize our plans.) The main reason for this email, though, is to make an entreaty on behalf of one of our favorite publications, _Current Affairs_. I could not be prouder of my subscription. We are sure many of you are loyal readers; it was a witty, charming, acerbic publication that has made a splash in only a few years of existence, and easily among the best left outlets anywhere. It is doing excellently, and is now planning an expansion—a better website, a wider reach, and more professional work. Left-leaning magazines (like most left institutions!) face a conundrum—they want to maximize readership in order to effectively spread the principles and ideas of leftism, but they also need resources for maintenance and expansion (so as to more effectively do the former). Right-wing outfits can rely on the generosity (or, rather, investment) of a few wealthy individuals; the same isn’t true of those at _Current Affairs_. Thus the free-rider dilemma of readers absorbing content without paying is a particularly acute one. (For those interested in this topic, I recommend one of my favorite books, Richard Tuck’s _Free Riding_.) Thus we urge you to avoid the often morally parlous position of the free rider (or, as Tuck would have it, the quasi-free rider) and contribute to _Current Affairs_ ’ expansion. It has raised more than $25,000 in just two days; if you can pitch in just $20, you’ll get a back issue of the magazine. (_Che affare_!)
[HELP _CURRENT
AFFAIRS_ HERE](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=18171c389f&e=85f7472d66)

Faithfully yours, David Oks Former campaign manager, Gravel 2020
---
| | _Copyright © 2019 Gravel 2020, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you requested to join our mailing list for press releases.

**Our mailing address is:**
Gravel 202015 Park AveArdsley, NY 10502-1621
[Add us to your address book](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=c3c2a27724)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=c3c2a27724&e=85f7472d66) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=c3c2a27724&e=85f7472d66&c=d0760e6065).

---

body:

name: Mark
subject: It's outrageous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
President Trump is taking away billions from the military in order to build a wall at the southern border -- including taking over $77 million from military projects here in Virginia.
|
---
| | Derek,

**President Trump is taking away billions from the military** in order to build a wall at the southern border -- including taking over _$77 million_ from military projects here in Virginia.

This outrageous use of executive power is going to hurt our military and make our country less safe, all while distracting from actual ways to make our border more secure.

Instead of using 21st century solutions to enhance border security -- like drones, electronic sensors, and more resources at ports of entry -- the president wants to use 14th century technology: **_a wall_**. And he's taking money from military projects here in the Commonwealth (like funding for a new cyber operations facility) that will _actually_ make Americans safer.

This is nothing more than a political power grab to fund a campaign promise-turned-vanity project.

**I opposed the president 's emergency declaration to build his wall, and I'm asking for your help to stop him from taking money from our military.

[Will you add your name to join me in speaking out against the president's power grab?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d10d/53d9897e/528fa18f/1c8e3347/3199797179/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-borderfunding")**

Thanks,
Mark **** **** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d10d/53d9897e/528fa18f/1c8e3346/3199797179/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20190905db__209__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")******

This is nothing more than a political power grab to fund a campaign promise-turned-vanity project. I opposed the president 's emergency declaration to build his wall, and I'm asking for your help to stop him from taking money from our military. "" Thanks, Mark ** | ** ""** ** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: On the bus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We’re running our hearts out because the best way to earn support is to show up for people everywhere, listen to them, and bring them into what we’re building across the country.
#
We’re headed to Boston from NYC on the Bolt Bus.
**Massachusetts will be the 25th state we’ve been to.** We’re closing in on nearly 400 events as a campaign, really setting the pace for everyone else in the race. We’re running our hearts out because the best way to earn support is to show up for people everywhere, listen to them, and bring them into what we’re building across the country.
**Thanks for making it all possible.** It goes without saying that your donations keep us on the road — by car, van, plane, train, and now bus. We’ve been to so-called “red states” that Democrats aren’t supposed to show up in. We’ve been to the “blue states” that some suggest you can just take for granted. And we’ve been to the places in between.
We’re going everywhere, to talk to everyone, every single day. But to run this kind of campaign, we need your help...
[Can you contribute $3 or whatever you can afford right now? Every bit helps as we continue to pound the pavement for this campaign and for this country.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32452?refcode=ema20190905-53372&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=53372%2E444211%2E0y2lMc)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32452?refcode=ema20190905-53372&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=53372%2E444211%2E0y2lMc)**
**This month, we face our most critical fundraising deadline yet.** We need to raise as much money as possible before we file our public report. So today I’m asking for your help so that we can keep up our aggressive travel schedule, so we can stay on the road, and so we can post an amazing FEC fundraising report at the end of the month.
Thanks for helping us out today, and thank you for all of your support and encouragement during this campaign.
Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=53372%2E444211%2E0y2lMc). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

I just watched Mitch McConnell close out one of the worst months of his career.

While Americans died from preventable gun violence...

While the climate crisis ravaged our coasts...

While children were ripped from their parents' arms at our border...

**Mitch McConnell was on vacation -- refusing to return to address these crises.**

His leadership was so reckless, even Fox News admits his favorability is the worst in the entire Senate.

But now, he's about to return from his month-long vacation.

[_**I want the overwhelming results of his failure waiting on his desk the second he returns. Will you take my McConnell Approval Poll before midnight? Help me gather 20,000 anti-McConnell responses. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece59d/4231639119/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20190905_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

Thank you,

Ben Ray Lujan

|

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece592/4231639119/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece593/4231639119/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece590/4231639119/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece591/4231639119/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece596/4231639119/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4bf/18e32a7f/528d5742/7bece597/4231639119/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

Albuquerque, NM 87125

[**We want to know -- Do you agree with Elizabeth Warren that these types of questions are a distraction from real climate issues?**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f0/4bd7760e/4118ed27/77e150ca/1660103760/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+We+want+to+know++Do+you+agree+with+Eliza&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1") | | | [Yes >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47f0/4bd7760e/4118ed27/77e150c9/1660103760/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Yes+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_190905_WarrenCNNClimate_U1_X1")

More than $2 billion has been spent lobbying on climate change legislation in the U.S. -- And polluting industries outspend environmental groups and the renewable energy sector 10 to 1.
**Now, the fossil fuel industry and big business are eager to shift the conversation to consumer choice to deflect from the bigger issue -- their pollution.**

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

clean_body: | | The DNC will NOT sanction a Presidential debate on climate change or allow candidates to participate in their own. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - "" During last night's CNN Climate Change Town Hall, moderators asked if part of addressing climate change means the government should be able to tell Americans what kind of lightbulbs they can buy -- And Elizabeth Warren wasn 't having it! "" The question comes straight from the climate-denier talking point that addressing our climate crisis means more government control and big sacrifices for everyday Americans. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" More than $2 billion has been spent lobbying on climate change legislation in the U.S. -- And polluting industries outspend environmental groups and the renewable energy sector 10 to 1. Now, the fossil fuel industry and big business are eager to shift the conversation to consumer choice to deflect from the bigger issue -- their pollution. "" "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, 314 Action | "" | | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, "", not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

name: Team Cory
subject: Team, we're changing our campaign strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- _The New York Times_ just said the 2020 presidential race is entering a new "sudden-death" phase: a sprint towards the finish that will result in many candidates dropping out. **[That means now is not the time to wait to donate -- to keep our campaign going strong, we need your investment now.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Here's why:** **FIRST:** The DNC raised the donor and polling thresholds for the third and fourth debates. **THEN:** In a crowded field, _only ten candidates_ \-- including Cory -- met the requirements to be on stage. **NOW:** We're exactly one week out from the debate, and we need your help to keep up the momentum. **Now is not the time to sit back and watch from the sidelines. Chip in to this campaign today to show you 're a part of this team:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_express5_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_express10_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_express20_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_express50_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_express100_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190905_TC_20190905-fr-TC-FTNdebate-actives_actives_expressother_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,20,50,100")_ We're in a new phase of this race -- this will be the first debate where all the candidates will appear on a single stage. This is when the frontrunners are separated from the rest of the pack. These next few months are critical. Fall marks the beginning of the sprint to early primaries that are now less than five months away, and that's going to determine who stays in the race and who goes. We've only gotten this far because of the support from grassroots community members like you. Let's not stop now. The road ahead of us won't be easy, and we can't afford to fall behind. name: Team Weld
subject: [Trump Watch] Misinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCP6sEfCsPFiFDbQ5wsc8K9Y&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=1) Friend — another week, more embarrassing moments for the President of the United States. **First:** Donald Trump tweeted out a FALSE claim that Hurricane Dorian was going to hit Alabama. [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCP6sEfCsPFiFDbQ5wsc8K9Y&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=2) **Then:** Outrage ensued because the President was tweeting out misinformation regarding the path of the storm, putting lives at risk. **Next:** To back up his false claim, the White House released a video where Trump held up an outdated projection model of the hurricane that was altered **_with a sharpie_** to show that the path would include parts of the Florida Panhandle and Alabama. [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCP6sEfCsPFiFDbQ5wsc8K9Y&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=3) **And then:** President Trump CONTINUED to double down on his tweet by going on unhinged Twitter rants demanding an apology from the media. **The reality:** _The South Eastern coast of the United States is dealing with a hurricane and the President of the United States is more focused on protecting his shallow ego._ In times of crisis, the American people need to know they have a leader they can count on for accurate information. And while it may seem funny that he is going to great lengths to defend himself, _**Trump’s actions on Twitter have real world consequences, and spreading misinformation about storms can cost people their lives.**_ This is just another example of why our movement is so important — the American people deserve a president they can depend on in a time of crisis. As Hurricane Dorian continues to its path up the East Coast, Bill and everyone at Team Weld are keeping those who are impacted in their thoughts and prayers. — Team Weld | | [SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCP6sEfCsPFiFDbQ5wsc8K9Y&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=4)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=5).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190905_fr&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Brian Peters, Iowa State Director
subject: What's growing in Iowa? (HINT: it's not just corn)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
Spoiler alert: it's Michael Bennet's momentum! | |
---
| Friends,

There's more than corn growing in Iowa, Team Bennet is growing too!!

This week in Iowa, Michael, his wife, Susan Daggett, and former first lady of Iowa, Christie Vilsack, held events across Eastern Iowa, and the energy and excitement on the ground was undeniable.

From Susan and Christie opening the second Bennet for America office in the state, to Michael's meet and greets in Cedar Rapids and Waterloo -- caucusgoers have been responding to Michael's message.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Michael has made it clear that he is a candidate who is unafraid to speak the truth and level with the American people. As the _Des Moines Register_ editorial board wrote, Michael "offers a much-needed reality check on the promises candidates are offering and what it will take to accomplish meaningful change."

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Earlier this week, Susan and Christie spent time at Abbe Hills Farms talking with climate activists and farmers and learning about how sustainable agriculture can protect our environment.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
Michael and Susan also celebrated Labor Day by meeting with caucusgoers and discussing Michael's plan to reward hard work, strengthen unions, and invest in American workers.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
(Photo Credit: Iowa City Press-Citizen)
It's clear that Michael is laser focused on two things: talking to voters and beating Trump. He spent time answering questions about our fixing our broken politics, rebuilding our education system, protecting our elections, and creating opportunity for all Americans.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
(Photo Credit: Iowa City Press-Citizen)
This campaign has a lot of heart. It's about creating real change. It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet.

Michael has never known an easy election, and he'll win this race the way he always has: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.

[**Our ground-game is strong but we need your help if we 're going to keep growing!**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Can you chip in any amount to help Michael continue to have these important conversations with voters everywhere?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f86/254711588/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafce/134673f2/bf2967d/69962f85/254711588/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_090519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thank you for being a part of this team,

Brian Peters
Iowa State Director

This week in Iowa, Michael, his wife, Susan Daggett, and former first lady of Iowa, Christie Vilsack, held events across Eastern Iowa, and the energy and excitement on the ground was undeniable. From Susan and Christie opening the second Bennet for America office in the state, to Michael's meet and greets in Cedar Rapids and Waterloo -- caucusgoers have been responding to Michael's message. "" Michael has made it clear that he is a candidate who is unafraid to speak the truth and level with the American people. As the Des Moines Register editorial board wrote, Michael "offers a much-needed reality check on the promises candidates are offering and what it will take to accomplish meaningful change." "" Earlier this week, Susan and Christie spent time at Abbe Hills Farms talking with climate activists and farmers and learning about how sustainable agriculture can protect our environment. "" Michael and Susan also celebrated Labor Day by meeting with caucusgoers and discussing Michael's plan to reward hard work, strengthen unions, and invest in American workers. "" (Photo Credit: Iowa City Press-Citizen) It's clear that Michael is laser focused on two things: talking to voters and beating Trump. He spent time answering questions about our fixing our broken politics, rebuilding our education system, protecting our elections, and creating opportunity for all Americans. "" (Photo Credit: Iowa City Press-Citizen) This campaign has a lot of heart. It's about creating real change. It's about building the kind of country that our children deserve. Not one that separates families, or underfunds schools, or refuses to protect our planet. Michael has never known an easy election, and he'll win this race the way he always has: by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country. "" "" | | "" Thank you for being a part of this team, Brian Peters Iowa State Director | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team de Blasio
subject: Introducing the "robot tax"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
36 million American jobs are highly likely to be automated out of existence in the coming decades.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad19/1490205972/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=726_org_em_fr")
Friends,
36 million American jobs are highly likely to be automated out of existence in the coming decades.

**Yes, you read that number correctly. 36 MILLION.**

Donald Trump is doing absolutely NOTHING to stop the millions of working people from losing their job to a machine. And why would he? It's making his billionaire buddies richer and richer.

Bill's got the backs of working people -- that's why he's introducing his "robot tax" and the most comprehensive automation plan of any 2020 candidate.
**[Learn more about Bill's automation plan and contribute $1 today to support this campaign.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad18/1490205972/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.billdeblasio.com/automation?refcode=726_org_em_fr")**
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad19/1490205972/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=726_org_em_fr")
[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad19/1490205972/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=726_org_em_fr")
---

Bill's automation plan is the **ONLY plan that would provide security for current workers and facilitate new, secure, good-paying jobs for the next generation****. **His plan will take on the threat of automation and ensure every American benefits from technological innovation -- not just the shareholders of the biggest corporations.
**[ Check out Bill's automation plan and chip in $1 if you like what you see.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad18/1490205972/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://www.billdeblasio.com/automation?refcode=726_org_em_fr")**
In Bill's administration, we'd close loopholes that allow companies to put their money in machines rather than people -- and then write off those investments on their taxes. Under his "robot tax," big companies that replace their workers with machines would be required to pay five years worth of payroll taxes for each worker. And all that revenue would go directly into infrastructure projects and 21st century jobs that will HIRE those displaced workers.
Bill's right: the current corporate automation regime is an existential threat to our nation's workforce. It's time to hold big business accountable and put money back in the hands of working people.
Let's do it,

Team de Blasio

[CONTRIBUTE»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad19/1490205972/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcyNiJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/de_blasio_donate_now?refcode=726_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad1f/1490205972/VEsB/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21d35/1630b3eb/5152229f/5f54ad1e/1490205972/VEsO/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.
